Summary: Really Good, would be 5 stars if it lasted longer. This tint is really good. I have on a scale from very fair to very dark, I have dark skin so In order to get this tint as dark as I need to I need to leave it on 20 minutes believe it or not. The suggestion and directions say 5-6 minutes for darker, but most of it wipes off. If you want darker brows youre going to have to throw out the directions and wipe and reapply to your liking. I also have very sparse brows, however my sister does not and I found it required less time to get her brows darker too. like 10-14 minutes. I think it takes me longer because I shape the tint like I would "drawing on" my brows so Its dying my skin at one point. The tint begins to wear off after 3 days (this is with me avoiding washing my brows or applying moisturizers) and I would say by day 5 it's almost completely gone. So if you like the look you will have to maintain it. 4 stars because I wish it would last longer.

Well, needless to say that facecloths don't stay hot for long, so using a compress wasn't an option. Then, I bought this eye mask and it solved my problem. Summary: Very cool effects Where do I start to describe the dimensions of this nail polish?!  I've attached 4 pictures, 2 in natural light and 2 in the artificial light of my bathroom.  In artificial light, you can really see the 3D effects. In natural light, the chameleon color shift really shows. You get 6 colors in the set, all beautiful.  This set does not come with the magnet but, I already had one so it was no big deal. First,  I polished all my nails with a black base color, 2 coats, and I let it dry thoroughly. I found it was best to work with one nail at a time. Give the bottle a good shake each and every time just before you apply it to the nail. That way, the magnetic particles stay mixed because they tend to settle to the bottom of the bottle quickly.  After applying one coat, hold the magnet as close as possible to the nail for about 30 seconds. Then, apply your favorite top coat and hold the magnet over your nail for another 30 seconds before moving on to the next nail. The effects are gorgeous! Love these!

Summary: Very great sanitizer if the scent and price are ok with you. I'm extremely satisfied with how newly this sanitizer was packed and sealed, it was shipped and sold by Amazon, maybe that is why! I already bought this sanitizer from Ulta and main site but I don't see they seal each mini bottle by plastic individually this way. This is a plus point for Amazon.
About the sanitizer, I know many people complain about its scent. Luckily, I already used the body lotion which is in same line with this sanitizer and has same scent, so at first when hearing too many complaints about the scent, I was not afraid much to try. Also, I like the design of this sanitizer bottle, it's square, cute with flip top cap which is very convenient to bring with you anywhere when you go out. I have tried lots of sanitizer brands during pandemic time, for me, I feel this is a very good sanitizer because it's creamy, thick but not greasy, dries very fast but doesn't make your hands dry at all, very comfortable after using and smells great (for me). The only thing that matters is the price. To be honest, for this size 66ml and more than $6 is too overpricing compared with same size sanitizers from other brands, even top brands like Purell or Safeguard. That's why I love it but I only bought 3 bottles as a big support from me to Hempz company and that's all. I would buy a whole box of this if I were a very rich girl as it's what I like, but my pocket will cry... So... Bye for now till I become much richer, lol...
Good job Amazon and Hempz. Suitability: 10/10

Summary: Safety is key I'm a cancer patient with a two year old. My medicines in a safe place is key for me. Unfortunately I have to carry around pain meds and others to get me through the day. This bag relives my worries of a child getting into my meds. I still carry narcan and keep my bag up high. Love this bag for so many reasons.

Suitability: 10/10
